subcodes.first_line: O Hashim, the delectable feast for every cherished and glorious friend! Thy letter hath been received. Thou didst write that 'Abdu'l-Bahá [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا هاشم الثرید لکل حبیب مجید نامه شما رسید مرقوم نموده بودی که عبدالبهاء
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @praise of Eastern values; culture, @past, present and future of Iran, @suffering and imprisonment, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha
